title: 3 Mistakes That Actually Made Me Profitable in ICT Trading
description: These trading mistakes changed everything for me. Learn the top 3 ICT trading mistakes that can actually boost your profitability when you understand them correctly.
script: These trading mistakes made me profitable. Here's what changed everything. Number one: Chasing every setup. This taught me patience matters. Number two: Ignoring market structure. Now I read price action perfectly. Number three: Risking too much. Small sizes equal consistent profits. Follow R2F Trading for more profitable tips like this.
